## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install with `pip install rag-playbook[openai,chromadb]`
2. Run `rag-playbook compare --data ./docs/ --query "..."`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error traceback if applicable.
